name: docuforge
description: Automatic documentary video generator — rule-based scripting, FFmpeg, Remotion, MoviePy

scripts.kill:ports: npm run kill:vite && npm run kill:backend
scripts.dev: npm run dev:check-ports && concurrently -n api,web,desktop -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @docuforge/api" "npm run dev -w @docuforge/web" "npm run dev -w @docuforge/desktop"
scripts.dev:force: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev
scripts.dev:web: npm run dev:check-ports && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @docuforge/api" "npm run dev -w @docuforge/web"
scripts.dev:web:force: npm run kill:ports && npm run dev:web
scripts.restart:backend: npm run kill:backend && npm run dev:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:electron -w @docuforge/desktop && npm run build -w @docuforge/web
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && npm run build:app -w @docuforge/desktop
scripts.postinstall: electron-builder install-app-deps -w @docuforge/desktop && npx playwright install chromium
